mainText:
Welcome to Bank of Entitlement, where your money is just as important as you are!

Visit Bank of Entitlement dot com for more.

ENTITLEMENT STORY: I once demanded a personal chauffeur from my bank because I was tired of driving myself to the mall like a commoner. When they refused, I threw a fit so epic that they not only provided me a chauffeur but also upgraded my account to VIP status with exclusive perks. Who says entitlement doesn't pay off?
